name: Will insurance cover sanctions from ChatGPT court errors?
description: Maybe for lawyers; check your policy.[2]

mainEntity.name: Will insurance cover sanctions from ChatGPT court errors?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe for lawyers; check your policy.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly under malpractice if lawyer involved; personal policies unlikely for pro se AI use.[2] Check policy.[1] Key factors: Covered acts; deductibles; disclosure. Notify carrier immediately; consult coverage counsel. Prevent with verification.
